target.title: fix(codex): preserve post-tool reasoning liveness
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep post-tool raw reasoning completions on the longer post-tool continuation guard instead of the short generic completion-idle timeout.
- Update Codex harness docs and reference docs so the config surface describes raw assistant/reasoning progress consistently.
- Refresh focused turn-watch coverage for the post-tool reasoning stall path.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-timeouts.test.ts` -> 2 files, 61 tests passed.
- `pnpm docs:list` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Post-tool raw reasoning progress no longer falls back to the short completion-idle timeout; it uses the post-tool continuation budget so quiet synthesis has time to reach final `turn/completed`.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout in an isolated worktree with the Codex app-server turn-watch tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-timeouts.test.ts`; `pnpm docs:list`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.

Evidence after fix: The focused turn-watch regression now asserts the post-tool reasoning path arms the configured post-tool timeout (`timeoutMs: 80` in the test), and the targeted Codex app-server test slice passed 61/61 tests.

Observed result after fix: Post-tool raw reasoning uses the configured post-tool continuation guard and times out before the long terminal watch if Codex never emits `turn/completed`.

What was not tested: A live Codex app-server cron/product-pipeline run was not reproduced; validation is focused on the mocked Codex app-server harness and docs checks.

Agent transcript: Not included; no explicit approval was given to attach sanitized transcript logs.
